title: Finite Secant Method Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite secant-method bad step QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational secant replay for f(x)=x^2-2 computes secant_next = 4/3 from x0=1 and x1=2, while a malformed row claims secant_next = 3/2, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional secant/root-finding rows only when they add distinct denominator-safety, bracketing, residual-bound, hybrid-method, floating-point, or theorem-reconstruction pressure; keep general convergence order and stability claims in future Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed polynomial, source iterates, function values, finite-difference denominator, secant correction, next iterate, and residuals as deterministic rational replay obligations.
Route the false secant next value through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact value.
Expose the pack through root-finding, exact-vs-floating, calculus, real-analysis, numerical-analysis, and learner query surfaces.

Keep general secant convergence, convergence order, denominator-zero preconditions, bracketing/globalization behavior, floating-point implementation correctness, and numerical-stability claims marked as future Lean or numerical-honesty work until formal routes exist.
